title: phlomis herba-venti subsp. lenkoranica
intro: Phlomis herba-venti subsp. lenkoranica, also known as the Phlomis lenkoranica, is a subspecies of the Phlomis herba-alba, a perennial plant native to the Middle East and Caucasus regions. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Phlomis lenkoranica include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-aging properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its essential oil is used in aromatherapy and as a natural remedy for various health conditions.
